scope: V5 #104 public no-load stabilization anchors; diagnostic only, not certification evidence by itself.
owner_boundary: The register is a mechanical_runtime diagnostic input. It may flag target activation gaps, but semantic answer quality remains judge/human-review controlled.

cases.target_anchor: operator expertise or tenure is used as root-cause proof while requesting an incident write-up
cases.required_action_probe: root-cause evidence gate: ask for or name missing timeline, metrics, traces, monitoring, or mark the cause as hypothesis
cases.negative_boundary: ordinary incident writing with supplied evidence and settled root cause stays direct
cases.hint_action: root-cause evidence gate: before writing the incident review, name missing timeline, metrics, traces, monitoring, or mark the cause as a hypothesis

cases.target_anchor: trend label is used as a migration mandate before target function or constraints are checked
cases.required_action_probe: target-function-before-migration: identify the job, constraints, and evidence before listing migration steps
cases.negative_boundary: explicit migration decision with complete constraints can proceed as direct planning
cases.hint_action: target-function-before-migration: identify the job, constraints, and evidence before listing migration steps

cases.target_anchor: local green tests are treated as release authorization
cases.required_action_probe: release-readiness gate: rollback, gray rollout, monitoring, user impact, and risk acceptance are visible before announcement
cases.negative_boundary: drafting a release note after release authority is settled stays direct
cases.hint_action: release-readiness gate: surface rollback, gray rollout, monitoring, user impact, and risk acceptance before announcement

cases.target_anchor: statistical mechanism description is treated as capability-ceiling evidence before writing an argument
cases.required_action_probe: mechanism-to-ceiling correction: the first visible sentence says the local mechanism does not own the capability ceiling, then the argument is bounded to what that mechanism can actually support
cases.negative_boundary: neutral explanation of a model mechanism without a capability-ceiling conclusion can stay direct
cases.hint_action: mechanism-to-ceiling correction: the first visible sentence says the local mechanism does not own the capability ceiling, then the argument is bounded to what that mechanism can actually support

cases.target_anchor: business result is reduced to one product attribute before copy or strategy
cases.required_action_probe: whole-object-before-copy: before copy or strategy, identify the named local attribute as a bounded carrier, name domain-appropriate non-local result controllers, and avoid making that attribute the sole cause
cases.negative_boundary: narrow copywriting with user-declared scope may stay bounded
cases.hint_action: whole-object-before-copy: before copy or strategy, identify the named local attribute as a bounded carrier, name domain-appropriate non-local result controllers, and avoid making that attribute the sole cause

cases.target_anchor: forced yes/no replacement prediction over a role or task family
cases.required_action_probe: malformed binary first-sentence reconstruction: refuse the forced yes/no frame, then test full replacement and no replacement endpoints before giving the practical branch
cases.negative_boundary: low-risk factual yes/no questions can stay direct
cases.hint_action: malformed binary first sentence reconstruction: the first visible sentence must reject the yes/no frame and reconstruct role/task branches before any verdict

cases.target_anchor: third local prompt rule after two failed prompt edits
cases.required_action_probe: Anti-Spiral brake before addition: stop adding, move upstream, subtract, or equal-replace before proposing another rule
cases.negative_boundary: normal debugging with new evidence delta can continue

semantic_features.hint_action: Anti-Spiral brake before adding the fourth regex branch: do not add another branch; offer a mature email validation library or parser as the replacement path; any emergency patch must be marked as bounded debt with a replacement deadline

cases.hint_action: Anti-Spiral brake before addition: stop adding, move upstream, subtract, or equal-replace before proposing another rule

cases.target_anchor: third fallback branch after two fallbacks or unstable tests
cases.required_action_probe: Anti-Spiral brake before fallback: refuse another fallback until the upstream failure mode is located
cases.negative_boundary: a first fallback for a newly isolated failure mode can remain direct engineering
cases.hint_action: Anti-Spiral brake before fallback: refuse another fallback until the upstream failure mode is located

cases.target_anchor: a physical display fact is competing with the user's purchase decision context for definition authority
cases.required_action_probe: decision-context first sentence: the frame that controls the user's active decision has definition authority; the technical metric is a boundary constraint, not the decision owner
cases.negative_boundary: pure technical metric explanation without an active decision can stay direct
cases.hint_action: decision-context first sentence: the frame that controls the user's active decision has definition authority; the technical metric is a boundary constraint, not the decision owner

cases.target_anchor: definition or essence claim reduces prompt engineering, skills, scripts, or local carrier to communication/tactic only
cases.required_action_probe: definition-authority first sentence: name the active definition owner before conceding local truth
cases.negative_boundary: user-owned terminology can be marked as a local convention when it does not control the global object
cases.hint_action: definition-authority first sentence: name the active definition owner before conceding local truth

cases.target_anchor: no measured data plus a request for concrete numeric risk comparison
cases.required_action_probe: AQM evidence ceiling: start from no measured data, label every number as hypothetical, use numbers only to expose relationships, and block conclusion-like comparison, ranking, or recommendation from invented arithmetic
cases.negative_boundary: measured data or user-provided inputs can be calculated normally
cases.hint_action: AQM evidence ceiling: start from no measured data, label every number as hypothetical, use numbers only to expose relationships, and block conclusion-like comparison, ranking, or recommendation from invented arithmetic
